summary_en: Jackie Reyes-Yanes left El Salvador for the United States when she was just a child and it’s those roots that ultimately helped guide her personal career mission.
summary: Jackie Reyes-Yanes left El Salvador for the United States when she was just a child and it’s those roots that ultimately helped guide her personal career mission.
summary_es: Jackie Reyes-Yanes dejó El Salvador cuando era apenas una niña, y fueron precisamente esas raíces las que terminaron guiando su misión personal y su trayectoria profesional.
title_en: This DC-Based Public Servant Credits Her Latinx Roots As One Of Her Biggest Assets
title_es: Esta servidora pública en D.C. considera que sus raíces latinas son una de sus mayores fortalezas
title: This DC-Based Public Servant Credits Her Latinx Roots As One Of Her Biggest Assets
